message:
docs(asupersync): refresh cutover runtime-guard validation report

Reshape the runtime-guard validation report from a flat {violations: [...]}
layout into a richer {checks: [...]} structure with per-check pass/fail
status and updated checked_at timestamp (2026-04-15).

Represents the latest guard run against the asupersync cutover and
improves readability (each check now carries its own pass/fail flag
rather than being inferred from absence in the violations list).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
